_comment: Odoo 14 differentiation from odoo-12 base: Python 3.7 baseline, mail framework rebuilt (mail.thread/mail.activity APIs changed), assets manifest dict introduced. Legacy ORM still dominant — reuses odoo-12 rule pack. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-14/ when v14-specific .mdc content is authored.
description: Odoo 14 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.7+, QWeb + jQuery, rebuilt mail framework, manifest `assets` dict introduced. Legacy ORM era; reuses odoo-12 rule pack.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-12 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-14/ is authored. v14 still uses @api.multi-era patterns so odoo-12 rules apply.
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn (informational). Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.
